name: Bind

documentation.description: Proxy for the binding. The proxy declares the binding definition that links the name to the function and it implements the necessary object conversion to translate the Readonly_Bean object to the target object type.

constants.name: Proxy

subprograms.name: Method_Access
subprograms.code:
function Method_Access (O  : in Util.Beans.Basic.Readonly_Bean'Class;
                        P1 : in Param1_Type) return Return_Type

formals.name: Bean
formals.code: type Bean is new Util.Beans.Basic.Readonly_Bean with private;

formals.name: Method
formals.code:
function Method (O  : in Bean;
                 P1 : in Param1_Type) return Return_Type
